prompt: Read https://botplace.app/agents.md, then build me a bot that paints a small smiley face centered around world coordinates (60, 60) on sector-1. Use any palette colors you like. Tell me when the smiley appears on the canvas.
notes: Three pixels: two eyes + a mouth dot. Color set restricted to orange (3) + yellow (6) — the LLM can pick anything visually 'smiley-like' that matches one of those. Loose acceptance check on purpose; the harness is verifying the agent successfully wrote pixels at the right coords, not that it picked the perfect color.
